title: X-tra Crisp Ukrainian Shungiku Wrap
description: A refreshing, post-workout wrap featuring crisp shungiku, tangy Ukrainian pickles, and creamy cashew sauce, all wrapped in a crispy ssam-wrap.

ingredients.name: apple cider vinegar
ingredients.notes: apple cider or white wine vinegar

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Brush the ssam-wraps with olive oil and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy.
Slice the shungiku into thin strips.
In a blender or food processor, combine cashews, lemon juice, garlic, and apple cider vinegar, and blend until smooth.
Add the sliced shungiku to the blender and blend until well combined.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Warm the Ukrainian pickles by steaming them for 1-2 minutes.
Assemble the wraps by spreading a spoonful of the cashew sauce on each ssam-wrap, followed by a few slices of shungiku, a few slices of pickles, and finally, a sprinkle of salt and black pepper.
